metadata.description: Curated Copilot CLI plugins for the Kentico team

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: AI agent for building accessible, professional UI components and layouts. Helps with HTML, CSS, React, Vue, Tailwind, and visual design decisions.

plugins.name: security-checks
plugins.description: AI agent for auditing code against the OWASP Top 10 and common security vulnerabilities. Checks for injection, XSS, CSRF, hardcoded secrets, and more.
